title: MD
biography: Andreas Vesalius was a Flemish anatomist who wrote 'De Humani Corporis Fabrica' (1543), the first comprehensive and accurate textbook of human anatomy. He is considered the founder of modern anatomy.
aiSummary: Andreas Vesalius is a anatomy specialist at University of Padua. Based in Belgium.

timeline.title: Published De Humani Corporis Fabrica
timeline.description: Revolutionary anatomical atlas that corrected centuries of errors and established anatomy as a scientific discipline
